name: Tina Hurst
body: So many prayers continue for all of you. I believe with you that the best is yet to come for Lyla and she is going to have such a testimony to share. Praying specifically for a sooner surgery date for her, so she can begin the road to recovery. Praying also for strength for you, Kayla and Micah and peace for all of you. Keep counting those blessings and may they abundantly multiply in Jesus’ name!

name: Natalie Rynard
body: Continuing more specific prayers with this newest update Lee🙏🏻. Hang in there, there’s a whole army of prayer warriors behind you all!!
